reasoning: The control 3.1.2 focuses on limiting system access to authorized users, which maps directly to Kubernetes RBAC for managing permissions and access control. RBAC ensures that users and service accounts have only the necessary permissions. Additionally, NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict network access, ensuring that only authorized ingress traffic is allowed, further limiting access to the Kubernetes environment.
title: 3_1_2: 3.1.2 Limit system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute
